raw_consumer_statement: Citi Mastercard has open XXXX accounts under my name without my permission. I did XXXX bank transfer from XXXX XXXX to Citi Bank Master Card. Citi Bank is charging me double amount of Transfer which against the law. I have been calling them to resolve the issue but no one is listening to me. Cit bank sent the credit debt to collection agency. I have disputed the amount and Citi Bank has not taking care of issue and are holding it against me.
